communications.subtitle: Move from a club signal to a warm follow-up — built around the way amateur clubs actually talk to families.

channelHint.whatsapp: Open WhatsApp with the message ready, per family.
channelHint.phone: Use the phone link for a quick check-in call.
channelHint.email: Optional: open an email draft when WhatsApp isn't appropriate.
channelHint.manual: Copy the recipient list and message to use elsewhere.

communications.templatePickerHint: Warm, club-friendly templates you can edit before sending. Editing one here only changes this draft.
communications.templateNoneHint: We'll keep the audience in view; the message is yours to shape.

overduePayment.title: Overdue payment reminder
overduePayment.subject: A friendly reminder about your club balance
overduePayment.body:
Hello,

This is a gentle reminder about an outstanding balance for {{athleteName}} at our club.

If the payment is already on the way, please disregard this note. If you have any questions or need a different schedule, just message us back — we are happy to help.

Thank you for your continued support.
overduePayment.hint: Best when paired with the overdue audience or the action center finance follow-ups.

trialFollowUp.title: Trial follow-up
trialFollowUp.subject: How was the trial session?
trialFollowUp.body:
Hello,

We loved having {{athleteName}} at the trial session. We would love to hear how it felt and answer any questions before the next step.

Whenever it is convenient, just reply on WhatsApp and we'll take it from there.
trialFollowUp.hint: Pairs well with the trial high-engagement watchlist.

attendanceCheckIn.title: Attendance check-in
attendanceCheckIn.subject: Just checking in
attendanceCheckIn.body:
Hello,

We noticed {{athleteName}} hasn't been at training as often lately and we wanted to check in. Please let us know if anything is going on or how we can help — there is no pressure, we just like to stay close to our families.

Looking forward to seeing them at the next session.
attendanceCheckIn.hint: Designed for the attendance watchlist and quiet-lately follow-ups.

sessionReminder.title: Upcoming session reminder
sessionReminder.subject: Quick reminder about your next session
sessionReminder.body:
Hello,

A friendly reminder that {{athleteName}} has a session coming up. If anything has changed, just send us a quick note so we can plan accordingly.

See you soon!
sessionReminder.hint: Useful before a planned training or trial session.

groupAnnouncement.title: Group announcement
groupAnnouncement.subject: Quick update from the club
groupAnnouncement.body:
Hello,

A quick note for the families in our group: please review the update below and let us know if you have any questions.

Thank you for being part of the club.
groupAnnouncement.hint: For grouped audiences when you want a single warm message to go out.

familyFollowUp.title: General family follow-up
familyFollowUp.subject: A quick follow-up from the club
familyFollowUp.body:
Hello,

We're reaching out with a quick operational update from the club regarding {{athleteName}}.

If there is anything we can help with, please reply on WhatsApp anytime.
familyFollowUp.hint: Default starting point when no other template fits.

audience.title: Who you're contacting
audience.reachSummary: {{reachableAthletes}} of {{totalAthletes}} families can be opened directly on WhatsApp.
audience.reachSummaryEmail: {{reachableAthletes}} of {{totalAthletes}} families have an email on file.
audience.reachSummaryPhone: {{reachableAthletes}} of {{totalAthletes}} families have a phone on file.
audience.reachAllReachable: All families on this list have a way to be reached.
audience.reachUnreachable: {{count}} family without any contact on file
audience.reachUnreachable_other: {{count}} families without any contact on file
audience.contextOverdue: Built from the overdue balance signal.
audience.contextTraining: Built from a training session roster.

draftPanel.title: Prepare your message
draftPanel.hint: Your message stays warm and editable. We'll keep the audience and source visible the whole time.
draftPanel.topicPlaceholder: Eg. Overdue June balance, trial follow-up, U14 reminder
draftPanel.subjectPlaceholder: Optional — only used if you switch to email
draftPanel.previewHint: WhatsApp keeps line breaks. Edit anything that doesn't sound like your club.
draftPanel.tokenHint: Use placeholders like {{athleteName}}; we'll personalise per family before opening WhatsApp.
draftPanel.interpolationHint: Tip: edits here apply to every recipient. Personal touches happen in WhatsApp.
draftPanel.tokensHint: Tap a chip to insert it. Green chips work for everyone; amber chips fall back to “—” when missing.
draftPanel.missingTokensWarning: Some recipients are missing values for {{tokens}} — they'll show a quiet “—” in the message.

lifecycle.stillRelevantHint: This draft has been waiting a few days. Refresh the audience or update the message before continuing.

athleteName.label: Athlete name
athleteName.hint: Resolves to the athlete on each row.

guardianName.label: Guardian name
guardianName.hint: Best primary guardian we have on file.

teamName.label: Team
teamName.hint: First active team the athlete belongs to.

coachName.label: Coach
coachName.hint: Selected coach or session coach, when the audience comes from one.

branchName.label: Branch
branchName.hint: Sport branch, when known for the audience.

sessionLocation.label: Location
sessionLocation.hint: Resolves when the audience is built from a training session.

nextSession.label: Next session
nextSession.hint: Selected session date and time, formatted for the locale.

outstandingAmount.label: Outstanding
outstandingAmount.hint: Outstanding family balance for this athlete.

overdueAmount.label: Overdue
overdueAmount.hint: Overdue family balance for this athlete.

clubName.label: Club
clubName.hint: Club name, when set in club settings.

actions.openWhatsAppFirst: Open the first family on WhatsApp
actions.draftSaved: Draft saved — you can come back anytime.
actions.draftReopened: Draft re-opened — pick up where you left off.
actions.followUpReopened: Follow-up re-opened with the same context.

recipientList.title: Recipients
recipientList.hint: Tap WhatsApp to open the chat with the message ready, or copy a personalised message to paste anywhere.

history.title: Recent follow-ups
history.hint: Drafts you can come back to and follow-ups you've already prepared, side by side.
history.empty: No follow-ups yet. Save one from the right panel to start the trail.
history.emptyFiltered: No follow-ups match the filters above. Try widening them.
history.staleDraftsSummary_one: {{count}} draft has been waiting more than {{days}} days.
history.staleDraftsSummary_other: {{count}} drafts have been waiting more than {{days}} days.

quickScenarios.title: Common follow-ups
quickScenarios.hint: Pick a starting point — we'll set the audience, channel and template for you.
quickScenarios.trialFollowUpHint: Trial athletes with strong recent attendance.
quickScenarios.needsFollowUpHint: Families with open readiness or review items.

communications.noPhoneWarning: No guardians on this list have a phone number on file. Add a phone to enable WhatsApp follow-up.
communications.selectionHint: Tap a recipient to open WhatsApp directly with their message.
communications.channelSwitchHint: WhatsApp is the primary channel here. Switch to phone or email if it fits the moment better.

modeHint.assisted: We'll prepare the message and open WhatsApp for you.
modeHint.direct: Direct send is configured for this club. We'll send via the WhatsApp Cloud API and fall back to assisted if anything goes wrong.
modeHint.fallback: Direct send isn't ready right now — we'll fall back to opening WhatsApp for you.
modeHint.loading: Checking how this follow-up will reach the families…

actions.directPartial: Direct send completed for {{sent}} of {{total}} families. Open WhatsApp for the rest if you'd like.
actions.directFallback: Direct send didn't go through — assisted fallback is ready.
actions.directFailed: Direct send didn't complete. The assisted path is still available.

readiness.title: WhatsApp delivery readiness
readiness.hint: How follow-ups reach families today. Assisted means we open WhatsApp for you; direct means we send through the WhatsApp Cloud API for this club.

stateHints.not_configured: No direct integration is configured. Follow-ups will open WhatsApp for the operator.
stateHints.assisted_only: This club has chosen to keep assisted-only follow-ups. Operators open WhatsApp themselves.
stateHints.partial: Some integration details are missing or unresolved. Direct send is paused until setup completes.
stateHints.direct_capable: Direct send is configured and validated. Assisted remains available as a fallback.
stateHints.invalid: The current configuration could not be validated. Direct send is paused until it is corrected.

readiness.fallbackNote: Assisted WhatsApp will always remain available as a calm fallback.

issues.missing_phone_number_id: WhatsApp phone number ID is missing.
issues.missing_business_account_id: WhatsApp business account ID is missing.
issues.access_token_ref_unresolved: Access token reference cannot be resolved in this environment.
issues.phone_number_id_invalid: WhatsApp phone number ID should be digits only.
issues.business_account_id_invalid: WhatsApp business account ID should be digits only.
issues.no_config_row: Direct delivery has not been set up for this club yet.

validationStates.pending: Run a readiness check to confirm direct send.
validationStates.invalid: The last check could not validate this setup.
validationStates.never_validated: No readiness check has been run yet.

validationMessages.config_resolved_locally: Local configuration looks complete. Run the live check to confirm direct send.
validationMessages.live_probe_accepted: WhatsApp accepted the credentials. Direct send is ready.
validationMessages.live_credentials_accepted: WhatsApp accepted the credentials. Direct send is ready.
validationMessages.assisted_only_intent: Direct send is intentionally off — assisted only.
validationMessages.access_token_ref_unresolved: We couldn't resolve the access token in this environment.
validationMessages.token_invalid: WhatsApp didn't accept the access token. Please check the secret.
validationMessages.transport_error: We couldn't reach WhatsApp from this environment.
validationMessages.provider_unavailable: WhatsApp is temporarily unavailable. Please retry shortly.

config.title: Direct WhatsApp delivery (Cloud API)
config.hint: Optional. When configured, follow-ups can be sent via the WhatsApp Cloud API instead of opening WhatsApp manually. Assisted mode always remains available.
config.enabledLabel: Enable direct send for this club
config.enabledHint: Turn this on once the integration is ready. Until then we'll keep follow-ups in assisted mode.
config.accessTokenRefHint: We never store the token itself. Use a reference like env:NAME so the host environment supplies the secret.
config.displayPhoneNumberHint: Shown to club staff so they can verify which number will deliver direct messages.
config.liveCheckHint: The live check makes a single read-only request to WhatsApp to confirm the access token is accepted. No real message is sent.
